settings.info: These settings are common for all sections.

grid_layout.info: The grid layout is used to divide the section into columns and rows.

faq_page.info: Those settings work only on the FAQ page.

for__card.label: Card aspect ratio
for__card.info: You can customize the aspect ratio of the card.

label.label: Button label
label.info: Leave empty to hide the button

group_labels.label: Card group labels
group_labels.info: Comma separated and ordered labels for groups.

color_scheme.label: Color scheme
color_scheme.has_cards_info: To change the card color, update your theme settings.

column_factor.label: Column factor
column_factor.info: Column factor is automatically adjusted for mobile.

delay.label: Delay
delay.info: Delay in ms before the section is displayed.

enable_filtering.label: Enable filtering
enable_filtering.info: Customize filters with the Search & Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/filters)

filter_type.label: Desktop filter layout
filter_type.info: Drawer is the default mobile layout.

label_description.label: Label description
label_description.info: Visible only for Choice type fields.

binding.label: Binding
binding.info: The binding is used to connect the form field with Shopify's some fundamental customer fields. The binding is used for only Normal type fields.

required.label: Required field
required.info: If enabled, the field must be filled out before submitting the form.

checked.label: Checked field
checked.info: If enabled and the field has multiple or single options, the first option will automatically be set as selected.

pattern.label: Pattern
pattern.info: Regular expression pattern for validation. Advanced usage only.

for__mobile.label: Mobile image
for__mobile.info: If mobile image is set, it will be used on mobile devices instead of the main image.

for__mobile.label: Mobile video
for__mobile.info: If mobile video is set, it will be used on mobile devices instead of the main video.

video_external.label: External video
video_external.info: Overwrites the image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

for__mobile.label: Mobile external video
for__mobile.info: If mobile external video is set, it will be used on mobile devices instead of the main external video.

for__mobile.label: Mobile media
for__mobile.info: If mobile media is set, it will be used on mobile devices instead of the main media.

for__header.label: Header layout
for__header.info: Header layout is automatically adjusted for mobile.

autoplay_speed.label: Autoplay speed
autoplay_speed.info: If set to 0, autoplay is stopped.

autoplay_interval.label: Autoplay interval
autoplay_interval.info: If set to 0, autoplay is disabled.

slides_per_view.label: Slides per view
slides_per_view.info: Number of slides per view. Set to 1 for single slide view.

end_message.label: End message
end_message.info: This message will be displayed when the timer ends.

color_background_gradient.label: Background gradient
color_background_gradient.info: Background gradient replaces background where possible.

layout_page_gutter.label: Page gutter
layout_page_gutter.info: Sets the spacing on the sides of the page.

layout_paragraph__grid.content: Affects areas with multiple columns or rows.

metaobject_for_product_groups.label: Metaobject for product groups
metaobject_for_product_groups.info: This custom metaobject will be used to display the product groups.

metaobject_for_product_options_type_valu.label: Metaobject for product options type values
metaobject_for_product_options_type_valu.info: This custom metaobject will be used to display the product options type values.

typography.name: Typography
typography.paragraph: Selecting a different font from system fonts can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

icons_corner_shape.label: Icon corner shape
icons_corner_shape.info: Only for icons with corner option.

color_tag_background.label: Badges background
color_tag_background.info: Visible when selected badge style is square or round. Badge style can be changed in the products section of theme settings.

product_swatches_on_card.label: Enable product swatches
product_swatches_on_card.info: When enabled, product swatches will be displayed on product cards.

card_product_image_hover.label: Secondary image on hover
card_product_image_hover.info: When enabled, secondary product image will be displayed on product card hover.

button_mobile_style.label: Mobile add to card button style

swatches_option.label: Swatches option name
swatches_option.info: The option name, which will hold the swatch colors. e.g.: `color`, `material`, etc...

sizes_option.label: Sizes option
sizes_option.info: Product's variant option name for size. example: `Size`.

option_1.label: Country name, currency code and symbol

enable_shipping_notification.label: Enable shipping notification
enable_shipping_notification.info: Show a free shipping notification based on cart price.

shipping_notification_threshold.label: Threshold cart price
shipping_notification_threshold.info: Minimum price value for free delivery. Defaults to '0' (always free shipping), if enabled and the field is left blank.

cart_terms.label: Terms checkbox text
cart_terms.info: Shows checkbox to accept terms and conditions, before proceed to checkout. More info [here](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/checkout-settings/refund-privacy-tos).

enable_dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons
enable_dynamic_checkout.info: Please be aware that third-party apps could disable these buttons. Read more [here](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/dynamic-checkout/compatibility).

enable_cart_upsell.label: Enable
enable_cart_upsell.info: Products are displayed based on the first cart product and Shopify Recommendations API and Search & Discovery app. Read more [here](https://help.shopify.com/en//manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

timezone.label: Timezone (GMT)
timezone.info: Select the store's timezone for the countdown timers in the theme.

image_optimization.label: Image optimization
image_optimization.info: Optimized option will improve performance and reduce bandwidth usage of your store. Best detailed option will keep the original image quality.

disable_animations_on_mobile.label: Disable animations on mobile
disable_animations_on_mobile.info: Disable animations on mobile to support older devices with less accurate rendering of content.

truncate.label: Text truncate line limit
truncate.info: Text truncate to the specified number of lines. If you set 0, the text will not be truncated.

link_label.label: Link label
link_label.info: Leave empty to hide the link

style.label: Button style
style.info: Primary button style on theme settings is used when default is selected.

button_label.label: Button label
button_label.info: Leave empty to hide the button

for__mobile.label: Mobile image
for__mobile.info: If mobile image is set, it will be used on mobile devices instead of the main image.

show_controls.label: Show video controls on product media

video_external.label: External video
video_external.info: Overwrites image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

icon.label: Icon
icon.info: Leave blank to hide the icon. You can find the list of available icons [here](https://www.digifist.com/en/help-center/documentation/theme/release/icons).

enable_transparent_header.label: Enable transparent header
enable_transparent_header.info: This setting only uses when this section is the first one of the group. It is recommended to ensure that the section has good contrast with the transparent header.

height.label: Height
height.info: If set to auto, the height will be determined by the content.

color_scheme_text_no_image.label: Text - without image
color_scheme_text_no_image.info: Text color scheme to be used when the collection has no image.

section_height.label: Section height
section_height.info: Set the height of the section. Desktop only.

button_style.label: Button style
button_style.info: Primary button style on theme settings is used when default is selected.

layout.label: Layout
layout.info: Alignment of heading, button and arrows.

fine_tuning.info: These settings allow precise control over the section's appearance.

default_header_height.label: Default header height
default_header_height.info: Set the default height of the header to prevent shifting on load.

video_desktop_external.placeholder: Use a YouTube or Vimeo URL
video_desktop_external.label: External video
video_desktop_external.info: Overwrites image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

header_media_mobile.info: If no mobile media is selected, desktop media will be used.

video_mobile_external.placeholder: Use a YouTube or Vimeo URL
video_mobile_external.label: External video
video_mobile_external.info: Overwrites image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

video_mobile_compact.label: Compact video
video_mobile_compact.info: Video will be displayed in a compact format on mobile.

placeholder_svg_code.label: SVG code for placeholder
placeholder_svg_code.info: Paste your SVG code here and it will be used as a placeholder image.

timer_extend.label: Extend timer
timer_extend.info: If you set greater than 0, the last day of timer will be extended by this number of days.

timer_end_message.label: Timer end message
timer_end_message.info: If this is set, the timer will be replaced with this message when it reaches zero.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.info: Use timezone name from [list](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones). E.g. Etc/Greenwich.

media_mobile.info: If mobile media is set, it will be used on mobile devices instead of the main media.

tile_aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
tile_aspect_ratio.info: This value sets the aspect ratio based on media position: for ‘top’ and ‘bottom’, it applies to the media, and for ‘background’, it applies to the tile.

media_aspect_ratio.label: Media aspect ratio
media_aspect_ratio.info: You can set the aspect ratio of slideshow media.

source_of_slideshow.label: Source of slideshow
source_of_slideshow.info: If you define a metaobject as a source, the slideshow will be populated with the media from the metaobject. You can find setup instructions on [here](https://www.digifist.com/en/help-center/documentation/theme/sahara/multitile).

header_slider.info: Enabled when 2 or more blocks are present.

dropdown_cards.label: Show dropdown cards
dropdown_cards.info: The option is only available when a single text slide is selected.

drawer_layer.label: Enable navigation drawer layer
drawer_layer.info: The show/hide feature is added to the third level menu elements in the navigation drawer

nav_logo_left.label: Navigation and logo aligned to start

transparent_header_on_scroll.label: Transparent header on scroll
transparent_header_on_scroll.info: Enable this option to maintain a transparent header even when scrolling. The background color will be removed, allowing for a fully transparent header during page navigation.

transparent_logo.label: Logo for transparent header
transparent_logo.info: Used when transparent header is enabled

logo_width.label: Max desktop width
logo_width.info: Works only when an image or svg is selected.

logo_width_mobile.label: Max mobile width
logo_width_mobile.info: Works only when an image or svg is selected.

transparent_header_bottom_border.label: Bottom border for transparent header
transparent_header_bottom_border.info: Works only when transparent header is enabled.

for__mobile.label: Mobile menu
for__mobile.info: If you want to use a different menu for mobile, you can create a new menu and select it here.

menu_column_count.label: Menu column count
menu_column_count.info: Number of columns in the menu.

header_first_additional_link.info: Positioned in main navigation or utilities, depending on selected layout.

header_second_additional_link.info: Positioned in main navigation or utilities, depending on selected layout.

country_drawer_header.label: Enable in header
country_drawer_header.info: Positioned in main navigation or utilities, depending on selected layout.

menu_item_position.label: Menu item position
menu_item_position.info: Enter a tier 1 link position to tie the block to its parent element.

image-link-text.name: Image with a link and text

header_background_color.label: Background color
header_background_color.info: Overrides the color scheme background. If the Password section uses a full-page background image, turn off “Show page background through header” there to keep this color visible.

sticky_checkout_button.label: Enable sticky checkout buttons
sticky_checkout_button.info: Enable sticky checkout buttons to keep them visible while scrolling in the cart drawer. Disable to use normal positioning.

empty_cart_content.info: Empty cart content can be updated from locales, under cart section.

background_image.label: Image
background_image.info: Covers the full page, including the password header. Set the focal point in the image editor.

background_overlay_opacity.label: Image overlay
background_overlay_opacity.info: Darkens the image so text stays readable. Set to 0% to disable.

header_transparent_over_image.label: Show page background through header
header_transparent_over_image.info: When a page background image is set, the header is see-through so the image continues behind it. Turn off to use a solid header color from the Password header section.

show_shop_password_message.label: Show password page message
show_shop_password_message.info: Uses the message set in Online store → Preferences → Password protection.

glass_background.label: Glass effect background
glass_background.info: Frosted glass look with blur. Works best with a page background image.

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: Optional text shown above the timer.

unit_label_style.label: Label style
unit_label_style.info: Short labels use compact abbreviations (for example min, sec). Full labels follow your theme translations and plural rules.

show_social_links.label: Show social media icons
show_social_links.info: Uses URLs from Theme settings → Social media. Only icons with a link set are shown.

social_links_new_tab.label: Open social links in a new tab

enable_filters.label: Enable filters
enable_filters.info: Enable filters to filter products by price, color, size, etc.

enable_sorting.label: Enable sorting
enable_sorting.info: Enable sorting to sort products by price, name, etc.

sidebar_navigation.label: Navigation
sidebar_navigation.info: Displayed as a carousel on mobile

products_per_page.label: Products per page
products_per_page.info: The number of products will automatically adjust based on the text card size to keep layout consistency.

products_per_row_default.label: Products per row
products_per_row_default.info: Desktop only. If products per row UI is enabled this will be the default value and if not this value will be used.

products_per_row_ui.label: Enable products per row UI
products_per_row_ui.info: Desktop only. When enabled users will be able to switch between 3 or 4 products per row.

position.label: Position
position.info: If position number is higher than products per page number, products per page number will be used

collections_per_page.label: Collections per page
collections_per_page.info: This setting is used only when all collections are shown.

color_scheme_for_collection_cards.label: Color scheme for collection cards
color_scheme_for_collection_cards.info: If All collections is selected in the Select collections setting, this option will apply. If you choose Selected collections, use the color scheme setting inside the block.

enable_filters.label: Enable filters
enable_filters.info: Enable filters to filter products by price, color, size, etc.

enable_sorting.label: Enable sorting
enable_sorting.info: Enable sorting to sort products by price, name, etc.

color_scheme_for_card_article.label: Color scheme for card with media

color_scheme_for_card_page.label: Color scheme for card without media

position.label: Position
position.info: If position number is higher than products per page number, products per page number will be used

image_height.label: Featured image height
image_height.info: For best results, use an image with a 16:9 aspect ratio. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/shopify-admin/productivity-tools/image-editor#understanding-image-aspect-ratio)

show_page_title.label: Show page heading
show_page_title.info: Uncheck only if the page content has `H1` heading

faq_title.label: FAQ Page Title
faq_title.info: This title will be shown when you use faq tile section in faq page.

api_key.label: Google Maps API key
api_key.info: Embeds a map with Google Maps. You can learn how to set up google api keys [here](https://support.google.com/googleapi/answer/6158862?hl=en).

address.label: Address
address.info: Uses the shop address by default. Override it using this format: street address, city country / state

product_media_layout.label: Gallery layout
product_media_layout.info: Slider layout is recommended for sections with page width, carousel for sections with full width.

behaviour.label: Behaviour
behaviour.info: You need to add content tabs block to set tab.

slides_per_view.label: Slides per view
slides_per_view.info: On mobile, only values below 1.4 are supported. For example, 1, 1.2, 1.4

slides_with_thumbs.label: Thumbnails
slides_with_thumbs.info: On mobile, thumbnails are horizontal and below the main image.

adaptive_ratio_and_auto_height.label: Adaptive ratio and auto height
adaptive_ratio_and_auto_height.info: If gallery area is so big in slider layout, you can use adaptive ratio to make it smaller.

enable_media_controls.label: Video controls
enable_media_controls.info: Works only if the video is not external YouTube or Vimeo

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: This heading overwrites the default heading of the block.

link_to_resource.label: Link to products
link_to_resource.info: Link to all products with given resource

show_price_extra_info.label: Show tax status and shipping policy link

title.label: Title
title.info: This field purpose is to display the correct name across section blocks.

back_in_stock.label: Make variants clickable
back_in_stock.info: This option makes clickable stock-out variants.

variant_picker_layout.label: Layout
variant_picker_layout.info: Layout options only effective if the type is dropdowns.

size_guide_page.label: Size guide page
size_guide_page.info: Displays the content of the page that needs to be created specifically for the size guide popup.

show_dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons
show_dynamic_checkout.info: Using the payment methods available on your store, customers see their preferred option, like PayPal or Apple Pay. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/change-the-layout/dynamic-checkout)

show_gift_card_recipient.label: Show recipient information form for gift cards
show_gift_card_recipient.info: Allows buyers to send gift cards on a scheduled date along with a personal message. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/add-gift-card-recipient-fields)

show_product_content.label: Show content from product description.
show_product_content.info: Overwrites the content and content from page fields.

product_content_type.label: Content from product type
product_content_type.info: Specify whether and how to use a delimiter from the product content. Applies when the content comes from the product. For 'below delimiter' and 'above delimiter' options, the product content must contain: `----`

custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

notice_just_text.label: Don't show the quantity, show only the text

metafield_for_product_file.label: Metafield for product file
metafield_for_product_file.info: Namespace and key value of the product metafield. eg. theme.product_file

content_type.label: Content type
content_type.info: Complementary products are customizable through the Search & Discovery app. [Learn more.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

default_product.label: Default product
default_product.info: This product will be used as a default if this section is not used on a product page.

drawer_richtext.label: Body text
drawer_richtext.info: Using the icon in the top right corner, you can add a dynamic source.

drawer_page.label: Page
drawer_page.info: If page is selected body text setting will be ignored.

customizer_visible.label: Show age verification popup in customizer

show_blurred_backdrop.label: Display blurred backdrop for sensitive content
show_blurred_backdrop.info: You need to refresh to see the changes for this option, or you can check from preview.

section_height.label: Section height
section_height.info: If you set 'Auto' the height will be calculated based on the content.

section_height_mobile.label: Section height for mobile
section_height_mobile.info: If you set 'Auto' the height will be calculated based on the content.

slider_autoplay_interval.label: Autoplay interval
slider_autoplay_interval.info: If set to 0, autoplay will be disabled.

video_external.placeholder: Use a YouTube or Vimeo URL
video_external.label: External video
video_external.info: Overwrites image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

header_media_mobile.info: If mobile media is set, it will be used on mobile devices instead of the main media. Videos play in the page.

video_external_mobile.placeholder: Use a YouTube or Vimeo URL
video_external_mobile.label: External video
video_external_mobile.info: Overwrites image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

enable_vertical_line.label: Enable vertical line
enable_vertical_line.info: Displays a vertical line below button. Visible only when content is horizontally centered.

banner_height.label: Banner height
banner_height.info: Set the height of the banner to change the height of section

button_separator.label: Separator
button_separator.info: Enable to add a vertical line between text and button when text is centered. Desktop only.

banner_height.label: Banner height
banner_height.info: Set the height of the banner to change the height of section

section_height.label: Section height
section_height.info: If you set 'Auto' the height will be calculated based on the content.

section_height_mobile.label: Section height for mobile
section_height_mobile.info: If you set 'Auto' the height will be calculated based on the content.

video_external.info: Recommended aspect ratio is 16:9. Overwrites image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

show_default_description.label: Show default description
show_default_description.info: If enabled, the default description of page, collection, product or blog will be displayed.

media_position.info: Use 'Background' position for section heights other than ‘Auto' to get better display; otherwise, the section hegiht will expand to cover media.

collections_menu.label: Menu
collections_menu.info: Add a collection menu by including [navigation](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/menus-and-links/editing-menus), whose first level links names match any of your shop's collections.

button_text.label: Button label
button_text.info: Leave empty to hide the button

header_image.info: This setting will only be applied in collection page

text_only.label: Display text only
text_only.info: This setting will only be applied in collection page

enable_first_product_image.label: Enable first product image
enable_first_product_image.info: Shows a picture of the first product in the collection you added.

banner_layout.label: Banner layout
banner_layout.info: Select the layout of the banner

full_width_banner_height.label: Banner height for desktop
full_width_banner_height.info: Set the desktop height of the banner to change the height of section.

full_width_banner_mobile_height.label: Banner height for mobile
full_width_banner_mobile_height.info: Set the mobile height of the banner to change the height of section.

header_media_mobile.info: If no mobile media is available, selected desktop media will be used.

collection.label: Collection
collection.info: Collection selection will overwrite product selection.

title.label: Heading
title.info: If no heading is provided, the collection name will be used.

max_products.label: Number of products for each group
max_products.info: Maximum number of products to display.

show_unavailable_products.label: Show unavailable products
show_unavailable_products.info: If enabled, products that are out of stock or unavailable will be displayed.

button_text.label: Button label
button_text.info: Leave empty to hide the button

header_products.info: Products are customizable through the Search & Discovery app. [Learn more.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

collection.label: Collection
collection.info: Products will be pulled from collection, overwrites products list.

gap_between_tiles.label: Gap between tiles
gap_between_tiles.info: This setting will be applied to separated layout.

gap_between_tiles_mobile.label: Gap between tiles for mobile
gap_between_tiles_mobile.info: This setting will be applied to separated layout.

block_size.label: First block size
block_size.info: Second one will be set automatically. Desktop only.

adopt_to_content.label: Adapt to content
adopt_to_content.info: This setting will adopt the section according to the content if your content is larger than the section height

video_desktop_external.placeholder: Use a YouTube or Vimeo URL
video_desktop_external.label: External video
video_desktop_external.info: Overwrites image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

header_media_mobile.info: If no mobile media is selected, desktop media will be used.

video_mobile_external.placeholder: Use a YouTube or Vimeo URL
video_mobile_external.label: External video
video_mobile_external.info: Overwrites image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

button_separator.label: Separator
button_separator.info: Enable to add a vertical line between text and button when text is centered. Desktop only.

spacing_inner.label: Block padding
spacing_inner.info: This setting works except for the 'background' option of the media position setting.

aspect_ratio.info: Aspect ratio only works if one of the image, video and external video settings is active.

marquee_duration_rate.label: Animation speed
marquee_duration_rate.info: The higher the number, the slower the animation.

layout.label: Layout
layout.info: When media none is selected, text is centered and media/link are not used

autoplay_interval.label: Slideshow autoplay interval
autoplay_interval.info: If set to 0, autoplay will be disabled.

link_url.label: URL
link_url.info: Used for media link as well.

image_mobile.label: Mobile image
image_mobile.info: If mobile image is set, it will be used on mobile devices instead of the main image.

success_message.label: Success message for newsletter
success_message.info: This message will be displayed when user has successfully subscribed the form

slider_mobile.label: Swipe on mobile
slider_mobile.info: Works only if 2 or more blocks are present.

autoplay_interval.label: Slideshow autoplay interval
autoplay_interval.info: If set to 0, autoplay will be disabled.

link_label.label: Link label
link_label.info: Leave empty to hide the link

api_key.label: Google Maps API key
api_key.info: You should create a Google Maps API key and add it here to display the map. [Learn more](https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/javascript/get-api-key)

section_height.label: Height
section_height.info: Set the height of the section. Desktop only.

slider_mobile.label: Mobile carousel
slider_mobile.info: Enable mobile carousel, works only if 2 or more blocks are present.

color_scheme_find_store.label: Color scheme for find store area

store_pin_link.label: Custom directions link
store_pin_link.info: If left blank, generated Google Map directions link will be used.

coordinate_title.label: Custom tooltip text
coordinate_title.info: If left blank, store name will be used.

store_latitude.label: Latitude
store_latitude.info: Enter the latitude coordinate. You can learn more about search by latitude [here](https://support.google.com/maps/answer/18539?hl=en&co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop).

store_longitude.label: Longitude
store_longitude.info: Enter the longitude coordinate. You can learn more about search by longitude [here](https://support.google.com/maps/answer/18539?hl=en&co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop).

reverse_positions.label: Reverse positions
reverse_positions.info: Reverse image and products carousel positions. Desktop only.

aspect_ratio.info: Useful for images and videos. Auto option is recommended for long text.

header_dot_position.info: Dot appears on image selected from section settings. Visible on desktop only.

autoplay_interval.label: Autoplay interval
autoplay_interval.info: If set to 0, autoplay is disabled.

slides_per_view.label: Slides per view
slides_per_view.info: Number of slides per view. Set to 1 for single slide view.

aspect_ratio.info: Sets the aspect ratio for the card when the media position is 'background', and for the media itself when the media position is 'top' or 'bottom'.

video_external.label: External video
video_external.info: Overwrites image and video. We recommend above video option for better performance, external videos can cause performance issues.

mobile_accordions.label: Show first accordion open on mobile

social_links_in_new_tab.label: Open social media links in new tab

layout.label: Layout
layout.info: Small logo appears in utilities column. Large logo appears at the bottom above copyright text, takes up entire screen width. If no logo is selected, logo is not displayed.

logo_width.label: Max desktop width
logo_width.info: Works only when an image or svg is selected.

logo_width_mobile.label: Max mobile width
logo_width_mobile.info: Works only when an image or svg is selected.

enable_payment_icons.label: Show payment icons
enable_payment_icons.info: Show payment icons, based on the payment methods available.

custom_payment_types.label: Custom payment icons
custom_payment_types.info: Add custom payment icons if you can't find the one you need in the list above. Duplicated icons will be removed.

copyright.label: Copyright text
copyright.info: To display current year type in [year]

enable_follow_on_shop.label: Enable Follow on Shop
enable_follow_on_shop.info: To allow customers to follow your store on the Shop app from your storefront, Shop Pay must be enabled. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/follow-on-shop)

icons.label: Icons
icons.info: Icons will be displayed instead of text

social_links_in_new_tab.label: Open social media links in new tab

logo_width.label: Max desktop width
logo_width.info: Works only when an image or svg is selected.

logo_width_mobile.label: Max mobile width
logo_width_mobile.info: Works only when an image or svg is selected.

header.info: To display payment icons, go to your [payment settings.](/admin/settings/payments)

custom_payment_types.label: Custom payment icons
custom_payment_types.info: Add custom payment icons if you can't find the one you need in the list above. Duplicated icons will be removed.

content.label: Text
content.info: To display current year type in [year]

paragraph.content: To allow customers to follow your store on the Shop app from your storefront, Shop Pay must be enabled. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/follow-on-shop)

is_open.label: Show content
is_open.info: When enabled content will be shown on page load.

page.label: Page
page.info: Outputs page content as topic body text. Overwrites topic content field.

header_custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

logo_card_svg_code.label: Logo card SVG code
logo_card_svg_code.info: Overwrites logo card image and defaults to logo SVG code

block_items.info: Except for the 'Tag stories with grouped posts' and 'List all posts with details' layout

color_scheme_for_items.label: Color scheme for block items
color_scheme_for_items.info: You can adjust color scheme for block items

aspect_ratio_for_layout.info: The Aspect Ratio setting applies to all layout options except for Tag stories with grouped posts

grid_items.label: Grid items
grid_items.info: This effects 'Grid post images' and 'Carousel post images' layouts.

tag_items_slides_perview.label: Tag items slides per view
tag_items_slides_perview.info: This effects 'Tag stories with grouped posts' layout. Desktop only.

source_of_slide.label: Source of slide
source_of_slide.info: The metaobject source option is available only for PDP. If the metaobject is not added to any product, this section will be hidden.

show_dots.label: Show pulse dots
show_dots.info: This option changes the appearance settings of shop the look dots in the list layout and in the drawers in other layouts.

add_padding.label: Add right and left padding
add_padding.info: This option adds left and right padding to the section when you select section width as Full Width.

social_avatar.label: Social account avatar
social_avatar.info: This field will be shown on each block, you can override it in block settings

button_label.label: Button Label
button_label.info: You can change button label for 'Grid post images' and 'Carousel post images' layouts.

header_title.label: Section header title
header_title.info: To disable header, leave this field empty

edit_mode.label: Edit mode
edit_mode.info: This option opens the drawer for the selected blocks, ensuring it remains open during changes for seamless content editing. This functionality is exclusive to the theme editor. Note: Remember to save after making updates in the edit mode.

product_image_ratio.label: Product image ratio
product_image_ratio.info: This effects the product card & thumb images in blocks

product_dots.info: Dot appears on image selected from section settings.

tag_story.label: Social post tag
tag_story.info: This field is to group post with the same tag, when tag stories layout is selected.

social_story_video.label: Social story video
social_story_video.info: Video will only be shown in slider layout

faq_button.name: FAQ tile button
faq_button.info: Button informations will take from first faq tile section.
